message:
feat(engine): propagate blocked exit code from react compile/build and pin replay contract

Make execute_react_compile and execute_react_build return exit code 25
when the output is blocked (deferred/unsupported capability), instead
of always returning 0. This gives calling scripts a reliable non-zero
signal for unshipped capabilities without masking actual failures.

Add regression tests verifying the blocked exit code for both react
compile (deferred support_status) and react build (unsupported SSR
target), including output file assertions.

Pin the frankenctl CLI workflow replay contract in a new integration
test that asserts the e2e script supports explicit replay run
directories, completeness checks for all required artifacts
(run_manifest, trace_ids, events, commands, doctor_input, step logs,
support bundle), and diagnostic output formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
